overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with blue hair exploring a dark industrial nightclub bathed in red neon lighting. The character moves from an upper corridor overlooking the city, through seating areas and past a bar, then descends to a crowded lower dance floor.

agents.ego_description: walking along metal corridor looking out at neon-lit cityscape through barred windows

entered.detail: metal bars covering large windows overlooking the city
red and orange neon lights from buildings visible through windows
industrial metal grate flooring throughout corridor
exposed metal pipes running along wall

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a narrow industrial corridor with metal grating floors and barred windows overlooking a neon-lit cityscape at night. Red ambient lighting fills the space as the character walks forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: nightclub seating area with red neon

patron sitting near wall with large circular red logo

dark leather seating arranged around low tables
large circular red neon gang symbol on back wall
drinks and bottles on small tables near couches

segments.scene_description: The character enters the main club area from the corridor, revealing a lounge with leather couches, scattered patrons, and intense red neon lighting. A large circular logo glows on the far wall as people sit and socialize.

events.description: turns right moving deeper into the club toward the bar area

agents.ego_description: moving through crowded club interior past standing and sitting patrons near graffiti-covered walls

red neon strips embedded in floor

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the club, the character passes graffiti-covered walls and patrons standing or crouching near the walls. The bar counter becomes visible to the left as red neon lights shift position.

events.description: approaches bar counter and turns left continuing through the club

agents.ego_description: walking past the bar counter where a bartender stands behind metal shelving

metal railing along upper walkway

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes the bar area, where a bartender works behind metal shelving. The environment features industrial pillars and doorways leading toward a staircase descending to a lower level.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower level dance floor with stage lighting

events.description: descends metal stairs to lower dance floor level with crowd below
brighter red stage lights and spotlights illuminate the dance floor area

agents.ego_description: walking down metal stairs and along railing overlooking the crowded dance floor below

notable_agents.action: crowd of people dancing and moving on lower floor
person standing near upper railing overlooking dance floor

entered.detail: bright spotlights and stage lighting over dance floor
elevated DJ platform with equipment
metal walkway with grating floor

segments.scene_description: The character descends to the lower level, revealing a crowded dance floor bathed in red stage lights. From the metal catwalk, the DJ booth is visible in the distance as people dance below.

scene_state.functional_zone: back bar area with DJ booth

events.description: game UI health and stamina bars appear at bottom of screen indicating player status

agents.ego_description: approaching the back bar area where a DJ performs at the booth

shelving with bottles behind back bar

neon signs and lighting above DJ booth
red illuminated strips on floor

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the back of the club near the DJ booth, where a bartender works behind a secondary bar. Game UI elements appear at the bottom of the screen as the character approaches the DJ equipment and neon signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark industrial nightclub that transitions from a secluded upper corridor to a crowded, neon-drenched dance floor. It begins in a narrow corridor with metal grating floors and barred windows overlooking a neon cityscape, moving forward as red ambient lighting fills the space. As the character enters the main club area, the scene opens into a lounge with leather couches and a glowing circular logo before shifting past graffiti-covered walls and a bar counter. The camera then passes industrial pillars and doorways to descend a staircase, revealing a lower level where red stage lights illuminate a dense crowd of dancers. Finally, the movement leads toward the back of the club, passing a secondary bar to reach the DJ booth and its surrounding neon signage.
